headline: The Shocking Similarity Between Micron and Nvidia as AI Turns Memory Into a Goldmine
summary: Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) led the first wave of AI enthusiasm with its powerful GPUs. Investors piled in as data centers raced to secure chips that could train and run ever-larger models. Yet as AI expands, the opportunity spreads beyond GPUs into unexpected corners of the stack. Memory — long viewed as a cyclical commodity prone to ...
